title: Mughal Serai

overview.short: Mughal Serai, Doraha is a caravanserai located at Doraha in Ludhiana District, India.
overview.description: Mughal Serai, Doraha is a caravanserai located at Doraha in Ludhiana District, India. Its popularly known as Mughal Caravan Serai as well as Doraha Sarai . It should not be confused with Serai Lashkari Khan, which is situated at 8–9 km (5.0–5.6 mi) away.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.description: Sahnewal is a city and a municipal council in Ludhiana district in the Indian state of Punjab. It is the hometown of the popular Deol family of Bollywood and the birthplace of Sunny Deol.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mughal Serai?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mughal Serai is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mughal Serai?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chandigarh International Airport (75 km) and the nearest railway station is Ludhiana Junction (21 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mughal Serai?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mughal Serai at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mughal Serai?
faq.a: Stays in Mughal Serai start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mughal Serai?
faq.a: The top attractions are Jaipura, Ludhiana, Doraha, Ludhiana, Bir Sahnewal, Barwala (Ludhiana East), Bhairo Munna.
